blind_spots.description: WK can overrate matches where Arsenal dominates shots/xG/possession but loses.
blind_spots.guardrail: Do not let shot/xG/possession dominance override result satisfaction. A loss to lower/mid_table opposition cannot be overall green.

blind_spots.description: 评估器B在5场比赛中认为WK评分偏低（precision=1.00）。特征模式：dominant_control=False, clean_sheet=False, dominant_xg=False。
